clockwork-soul.description: Learn additional spells: alarm, protection from evil and good, aid, lesser restoration, dispel magic, protection from energy, freedom of movement, summon construct, greater restoration, wall of force. These are sorcerer spells for you.

clockwork-soul.name: Restore Balance
clockwork-soul.description: When a creature within 60 ft makes a roll with advantage or disadvantage, use your reaction to cancel the advantage or disadvantage. Proficiency-bonus uses per long rest.

clockwork-soul.name: Bastion of Law
clockwork-soul.description: As an action, spend up to 5 sorcery points to create a protective ward on yourself or an ally, reducing damage by 1d8 per point spent until the ward absorbs that much damage.

clockwork-soul.name: Trance of Order
clockwork-soul.description: As a bonus action, for 1 minute, attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws have a floor of 10 on the d20. Once per long rest or spend 5 sorcery points.

clockwork-soul.name: Clockwork Cavalcade
clockwork-soul.description: As an action, spend 5 sorcery points to summon a sphere of order for 1 minute. Allies in a 30-ft cube regain 100 HP, end all spells of 6th level or lower, and broken/ruined objects within the cube are repaired.

the-fiend.name: Dark One's Blessing
the-fiend.description: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, gain temporary HP equal to your Charisma modifier + warlock level.

the-fiend.name: Expanded Spell List
the-fiend.description: Add burning hands, command at 1st; blindness/deafness, scorching ray at 3rd; fireball, stinking cloud at 5th; fire shield, wall of fire at 7th; flame strike, hallow at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-fiend.name: Dark One's Own Luck
the-fiend.description: Add 1d10 to one ability check or saving throw. Once per short or long rest.

the-fiend.name: Fiendish Resilience
the-fiend.description: At the end of a short or long rest, choose one damage type to gain resistance to until you choose another.

the-fiend.name: Hurl Through Hell
the-fiend.description: When you hit a creature, you can send it through the lower planes. It disappears until the end of your next turn, then returns taking 10d10 psychic damage. Once per long rest.

the-archfey.name: Fey Presence
the-archfey.description: As an action, force creatures in a 10-ft cube to make a Wisdom save or be charmed or frightened of you until the end of your next turn. Once per short or long rest.

the-archfey.name: Expanded Spell List
the-archfey.description: Add faerie fire, sleep at 1st; calm emotions, phantasmal force at 3rd; blink, plant growth at 5th; dominate beast, greater invisibility at 7th; dominate person, seeming at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-archfey.name: Misty Escape
the-archfey.description: When you take damage, use your reaction to teleport 60 ft and become invisible until the start of your next turn. Once per short or long rest.

the-archfey.name: Beguiling Defenses
the-archfey.description: You are immune to being charmed. When a creature tries to charm you, you can use your reaction to turn the charm back on it.

the-archfey.name: Dark Delirium
the-archfey.description: As an action, plunge a creature within 60 ft into an illusory realm for 1 minute (Wisdom save). While affected, it is charmed or frightened and cannot perceive the real world. Once per short or long rest.

the-great-old-one.name: Awakened Mind
the-great-old-one.description: Telepathically communicate with any creature within 30 ft that can understand at least one language.

the-great-old-one.name: Expanded Spell List
the-great-old-one.description: Add dissonant whispers, Tasha's hideous laughter at 1st; detect thoughts, phantasmal force at 3rd; clairvoyance, sending at 5th; dominate beast, Evard's black tentacles at 7th; dominate person, telekinesis at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-great-old-one.name: Entropic Ward
the-great-old-one.description: When a creature makes an attack roll against you, use your reaction to impose disadvantage. If it misses, your next attack against it has advantage. Once per short or long rest.

the-great-old-one.name: Thought Shield
the-great-old-one.description: Your thoughts cannot be read without your consent. You have resistance to psychic damage, and when a creature deals psychic damage to you, it takes the same amount.

the-great-old-one.name: Create Thrall
the-great-old-one.description: Touch an incapacitated humanoid to charm it indefinitely. It obeys you telepathically until you use this feature again or remove the effect with an action. Once per long rest.

the-celestial.name: Expanded Spell List
the-celestial.description: Add cure wounds, guiding bolt at 1st; flaming sphere, lesser restoration at 3rd; daylight, revivify at 5th; guardian of faith, wall of fire at 7th; flame strike, greater restoration at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-celestial.name: Healing Light
the-celestial.description: Gain a pool of d6s equal to 1 + warlock level. As a bonus action, spend up to Charisma modifier dice to heal a creature within 60 ft. Recharges on long rest.

the-celestial.name: Radiant Soul
the-celestial.description: Gain resistance to radiant damage. When you cast a spell dealing radiant or fire damage, add Charisma modifier to one radiant or fire damage roll.

the-celestial.name: Celestial Resilience
the-celestial.description: At the end of a short or long rest, allies within 30 ft gain temp HP equal to half your warlock level + Charisma modifier.

the-celestial.name: Searing Vengeance
the-celestial.description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to half your maximum HP instead, regain half your spell slots, and creatures of your choice within 30 ft take 2d8 + Charisma modifier radiant damage and are blinded until the end of your next turn. Once per long rest.

the-hexblade.name: Hexblade's Curse
the-hexblade.description: As a bonus action, curse a creature within 30 ft for 1 minute. You crit on 19-20 against it and add your proficiency bonus to damage. If it dies, you regain HP equal to warlock level + Charisma modifier. Once per short or long rest.

the-hexblade.name: Hex Warrior
the-hexblade.description: Gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons. When you finish a long rest, touch one weapon to use Charisma for attack and damage rolls with it.

the-hexblade.name: Expanded Spell List
the-hexblade.description: Add shield, wrathful smite at 1st; blur, branding smite at 3rd; blink, elemental weapon at 5th; phantasmal killer, staggering smite at 7th; banishing smite, cone of cold at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-hexblade.name: Accursed Specter
the-hexblade.description: When you slay a humanoid, raise its spirit as a specter under your control. It lasts until the end of your next long rest. Once per long rest.

the-hexblade.name: Armor of Hexes
the-hexblade.description: When your Hexblade's Curse target hits you, roll a d6. On a 4+, the attack misses instead.

the-hexblade.name: Master of Hexes
the-hexblade.description: When your Hexblade's Curse target dies, use your reaction to transfer the curse to a different creature within 30 ft without expending a use.

the-fathomless.name: Expanded Spell List
the-fathomless.description: Add create or destroy water, thunderwave at 1st; gust of wind, silence at 3rd; lightning bolt, sleet storm at 5th; control water, summon elemental at 7th; Bigby's hand, cone of cold at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-fathomless.name: Tentacle of the Deeps
the-fathomless.description: As a bonus action, summon a spectral tentacle within 60 ft for 1 minute. As a bonus action each turn, it can strike a creature within 10 ft dealing 1d8 cold damage and reducing its speed 10 ft. Proficiency-bonus uses per long rest.

the-fathomless.name: Oceanic Soul
the-fathomless.description: Gain resistance to cold damage. You can breathe underwater and gain a swimming speed of 40 ft.

the-fathomless.name: Guardian Coil
the-fathomless.description: When a creature within 10 ft of your tentacle takes damage, use your reaction to reduce the damage by 1d8 + your Charisma modifier. At the same time, the attacker takes the same amount of cold damage.

the-fathomless.name: Fathomless Plunge
the-fathomless.description: As an action, teleport yourself and up to 5 willing creatures within 30 ft to a body of water you've seen on the same plane. Once per short or long rest.

the-genie.name: Expanded Spell List
the-genie.description: Varies by genie type: Dao (bludgeoning/earth), Djinni (thunder/air), Efreeti (fire), Marid (cold/water). Add spells like detect evil and good, phantasmal force, create food and water, stone shape, creation, etc., varying by patron.

the-genie.name: Genie's Vessel
the-genie.description: Gain a Tiny object (ring or lamp) as a vessel. As an action, enter the vessel; its interior is a 20-ft-radius cylinder furnished comfortably. You can remain inside for proficiency-bonus × 2 hours before being ejected. You can hear what's happening outside.

the-genie.name: Bottled Respite
the-genie.description: When you enter your vessel, you can take up to 5 willing creatures with you. Your vessel's AC equals your spell save DC. If it's destroyed, you appear in the nearest unoccupied space.

the-genie.name: Elemental Gift
the-genie.description: Gain resistance to your genie's element (acid/dao, lightning/djinni, fire/efreeti, cold/marid). As a bonus action, gain a 30-ft fly speed for 10 minutes. Proficiency-bonus uses per long rest.

the-genie.name: Sanctuary Vessel
the-genie.description: When entering your vessel, you and companions can take a short rest in 10 minutes. After leaving, each creature gains temp HP equal to your proficiency bonus + Charisma modifier.

the-genie.name: Limited Wish
the-genie.description: As an action, duplicate the effect of any 6th-level-or-lower spell from any class. The spell takes effect as part of this action. Once per 1d4 long rests.

the-undead.name: Expanded Spell List
the-undead.description: Add bane, false life at 1st; blindness/deafness, phantasmal force at 3rd; phantom steed, speak with dead at 5th; death ward, greater invisibility at 7th; antilife shell, cloudkill at 9th to your warlock spell list.

the-undead.name: Form of Dread
the-undead.description: As a bonus action, transform for 1 minute. Gain temp HP equal to 1d10 + warlock level. Once per turn when you hit with an attack, the target must save or be frightened. Immune to frightened condition.

the-undead.name: Grave Touched
the-undead.description: When you deal damage while in Form of Dread, you can change the damage type to necrotic. While transformed, you don't need to eat, drink, or breathe.

the-undead.name: Necrotic Husk
the-undead.description: Gain resistance to necrotic damage. When reduced to 0 HP, you can instead drop to 1 HP and deal 2d10 + warlock level necrotic to creatures of your choice within 30 ft. Once per long rest.

the-undead.name: Spirit Projection
the-undead.description: As an action, your spirit leaves your body for 1 hour. You gain a fly speed of 30 ft (hover), resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing from non-magical sources, and your body gains resistance to all damage. Once per long rest.

school-of-evocation.name: Evocation Savant
school-of-evocation.description: Time and gold spent to copy evocation spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-evocation.name: Sculpt Spells
school-of-evocation.description: When casting an evocation spell, choose 1 + spell level creatures to automatically succeed on saves and take no damage instead of half.

school-of-evocation.name: Potent Cantrip
school-of-evocation.description: When a creature succeeds on a save against your cantrip, it still takes half the damage (no other effects).

school-of-evocation.name: Empowered Evocation
school-of-evocation.description: Add Intelligence modifier to one damage roll of any wizard evocation spell.

school-of-evocation.name: Overchannel
school-of-evocation.description: When casting a wizard evocation spell of 5th level or lower, you can deal maximum damage. After the first use each day, subsequent uses deal 2d12 necrotic per slot level to you. You can only overchannel a given spell level once per long rest.

school-of-abjuration.name: Abjuration Savant
school-of-abjuration.description: Time and gold spent to copy abjuration spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-abjuration.name: Arcane Ward
school-of-abjuration.description: When you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, create a magical ward with HP equal to 2 × wizard level + Intelligence modifier. It absorbs damage before your HP, and regenerates HP equal to twice the spell level when you cast another abjuration spell.

school-of-abjuration.name: Projected Ward
school-of-abjuration.description: As a reaction, direct your Arcane Ward to protect a creature within 30 ft, taking the damage for them.

school-of-abjuration.name: Improved Abjuration
school-of-abjuration.description: When casting an abjuration spell that requires an ability check (such as counterspell or dispel magic), add your proficiency bonus to the check.

school-of-abjuration.name: Spell Resistance
school-of-abjuration.description: Gain advantage on saving throws against spells and resistance to damage from spells.

school-of-divination.name: Divination Savant
school-of-divination.description: Time and gold spent to copy divination spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-divination.name: Portent
school-of-divination.description: After a long rest, roll two d20s and record the results. Before the end of your next long rest, you can replace any attack roll, saving throw, or ability check made by you or a creature you can see with one of these rolls.

school-of-divination.name: Expert Divination
school-of-divination.description: When you cast a divination spell of 2nd level or higher, regain a spell slot of one level lower.

school-of-divination.name: The Third Eye
school-of-divination.description: As an action, gain one of the following for 1 minute: darkvision 60 ft, ethereal sight 60 ft, see invisible creatures within 10 ft, or read all languages.

school-of-divination.name: Greater Portent
school-of-divination.description: You now roll three Portent dice instead of two at the end of a long rest.

school-of-enchantment.name: Enchantment Savant
school-of-enchantment.description: Time and gold spent to copy enchantment spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-enchantment.name: Hypnotic Gaze
school-of-enchantment.description: As an action, charm a creature within 5 ft into a dazed stupor until the end of your next turn (Wisdom save). Its speed becomes 0 and it cannot take actions. Requires your action each turn to maintain.

school-of-enchantment.name: Instinctive Charm
school-of-enchantment.description: When a creature within 30 ft attacks you, use your reaction to force it to make a Wisdom save or redirect the attack to another creature of your choice within its reach.

school-of-enchantment.name: Split Enchantment
school-of-enchantment.description: When casting an enchantment spell that targets one creature, you can target a second creature.

school-of-enchantment.name: Alter Memories
school-of-enchantment.description: When you charm a creature, you can erase its memory of the time it was charmed for up to 1 + Charisma modifier hours. Once per long rest per creature.

school-of-illusion.name: Illusion Savant
school-of-illusion.description: Time and gold spent to copy illusion spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-illusion.name: Improved Minor Illusion
school-of-illusion.description: Learn minor illusion; if you already know it, learn a different cantrip. You can create both a sound and an image simultaneously.

school-of-illusion.name: Malleable Illusions
school-of-illusion.description: As an action, change the nature of an illusion spell you cast with a duration of 1 minute or longer, provided you can see it.

school-of-illusion.name: Illusory Self
school-of-illusion.description: When a creature makes an attack roll against you, use your reaction to create an illusory duplicate. The attack automatically misses. Once per short or long rest.

school-of-illusion.name: Illusory Reality
school-of-illusion.description: When you cast an illusion spell of 1st level or higher, use a bonus action to make one non-magical object in the illusion real for 1 minute. The object cannot deal damage.

school-of-necromancy.name: Necromancy Savant
school-of-necromancy.description: Time and gold spent to copy necromancy spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-necromancy.name: Grim Harvest
school-of-necromancy.description: When you kill a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher, regain HP equal to twice the spell level (3× for necromancy spells). Does not work on constructs or undead.

school-of-necromancy.name: Undead Thralls
school-of-necromancy.description: Add animate dead to your spellbook if you don't have it. Animated undead gain +wizard level HP and +proficiency bonus to weapon damage. Create an additional undead when casting animate dead.

school-of-necromancy.name: Inured to Undeath
school-of-necromancy.description: Gain resistance to necrotic damage. Your HP maximum cannot be reduced.

school-of-necromancy.name: Command Undead
school-of-necromancy.description: As an action, charm one undead within 60 ft that you can see (Intelligence save). If its Intelligence is below 12, it is permanently charmed; otherwise it repeats the save each hour.

school-of-transmutation.name: Transmutation Savant
school-of-transmutation.description: Time and gold spent to copy transmutation spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-transmutation.name: Minor Alchemy
school-of-transmutation.description: Spend 10 minutes to temporarily change the physical properties of one non-magical object, such as wood to stone or iron to silver, for 1 hour.

school-of-transmutation.name: Transmuter's Stone
school-of-transmutation.description: Spend 8 hours creating a stone that grants a benefit when held: darkvision 60 ft, +10 ft speed, proficiency in Constitution saves, or resistance to one element. Only one stone can exist at a time.

school-of-transmutation.name: Shapechanger
school-of-transmutation.description: Cast polymorph on yourself once per short rest, but only to become a beast of CR 1 or lower.

school-of-transmutation.name: Master Transmuter
school-of-transmutation.description: Destroy your transmuter's stone to: transform any non-magical object (up to 5 ft cube) into another material, cure all curses/diseases/poisons on one creature, raise dead (as the raise dead spell without a spell slot), or make one creature appear 3d10 years younger. When the stone is destroyed, you must create a new one.

school-of-conjuration.name: Conjuration Savant
school-of-conjuration.description: Time and gold spent to copy conjuration spells into your spellbook is halved.

school-of-conjuration.name: Minor Conjuration
school-of-conjuration.description: As an action, conjure a non-magical object you have seen before in your hand or on the ground. It glows dimly and lasts 1 hour. Weight limit 10 lbs and max 3 ft in any dimension. One at a time.

school-of-conjuration.name: Benign Transposition
school-of-conjuration.description: As an action, teleport up to 30 ft or swap places with a willing Small or Medium creature within 30 ft. Once per long rest or when you cast a conjuration spell of 1st level or higher.

school-of-conjuration.name: Focused Conjuration
school-of-conjuration.description: Your concentration on conjuration spells cannot be broken by taking damage.

school-of-conjuration.name: Durable Summons
school-of-conjuration.description: Creatures you conjure gain 30 temporary HP when they appear.

bladesinging.name: Training in War and Song
bladesinging.description: Gain proficiency with light armor and one one-handed melee weapon of your choice. Gain proficiency in Performance.

bladesinging.name: Bladesong
bladesinging.description: As a bonus action, enter a trance for 1 minute (proficiency-bonus uses per long rest). Gain +Int to AC, +10 ft walking speed, advantage on Acrobatics, and +Int to Constitution saves for concentration. Ends if you use two hands to attack, wear medium/heavy armor, or use a shield.

bladesinging.name: Extra Attack
bladesinging.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action. One of these attacks can be a cantrip.

bladesinging.name: Song of Defense
bladesinging.description: When you take damage while Bladesong is active, spend a spell slot to reduce the damage by 5 × slot level.

bladesinging.name: Song of Victory
bladesinging.description: While Bladesong is active, add your Intelligence modifier to melee weapon damage rolls.

order-of-scribes.name: Wizardly Quill
order-of-scribes.description: Magically create a quill that requires no ink. Copying spells takes 2 minutes per spell level instead of 2 hours.

order-of-scribes.name: Awakened Spellbook
order-of-scribes.description: Your spellbook becomes a sentient magic item and spellcasting focus. When you finish a short rest, swap the damage type of a spell you cast with that of another spell in your book at the same level. Once per short rest.

order-of-scribes.name: Manifest Mind
order-of-scribes.description: As a bonus action, summon a spectral mind within 60 ft for proficiency-bonus minutes. You can see/hear through it and cast spells as though you were in its space. Proficiency-bonus uses per long rest.

order-of-scribes.name: Master Scrivener
order-of-scribes.description: Create scrolls faster. When you finish a long rest, you can create one 1st or 2nd-level spell scroll by expending a spell slot. The scroll's spell attack/save uses your stats and lasts until your next long rest.

order-of-scribes.name: One with the Word
order-of-scribes.description: When your spectral mind would take damage, you can negate it by temporarily erasing the mind, then resummoning it. Also, when you would drop to 0 HP, you can instead sacrifice spells from your spellbook to stay up.

chronurgy-magic.name: Chronal Shift
chronurgy-magic.description: As a reaction, force a creature within 30 ft to reroll a d20 after seeing the result but before the outcome is declared. Twice per long rest.

chronurgy-magic.name: Temporal Awareness
chronurgy-magic.description: Add your Intelligence modifier to initiative rolls.

chronurgy-magic.name: Momentary Stasis
chronurgy-magic.description: As an action, force a Large or smaller creature within 60 ft to make a Constitution save or be frozen in time until the end of your next turn. Proficiency-bonus uses per long rest.

chronurgy-magic.name: Arcane Abeyance
chronurgy-magic.description: When you cast a spell of 4th level or lower, condense its magic into a bead. A creature holding the bead can release it as an action to take effect. Lasts 1 hour before dissipating.

chronurgy-magic.name: Convergent Future
chronurgy-magic.description: As a reaction, force a d20 roll made within 60 ft to succeed or fail. Each use after the first per long rest gives you a level of exhaustion.

graviturgy-magic.name: Adjust Density
graviturgy-magic.description: As an action, magically alter a creature's density within 30 ft for 1 minute. Halve or double its weight, granting advantage/disadvantage on Dexterity checks, Acrobatics, and Stealth. Proficiency-bonus uses per long rest.

graviturgy-magic.name: Gravity Well
graviturgy-magic.description: When you cast a spell on a creature, you can move the target 5 ft vertically or horizontally.

graviturgy-magic.name: Violent Attraction
graviturgy-magic.description: When a creature within 60 ft is hit by a bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing attack, use your reaction to increase the attack's damage by 1d10. Alternatively, when a creature within 60 ft falls, you can amplify the impact (save or take extra damage).

graviturgy-magic.name: Event Horizon
graviturgy-magic.description: As an action, create a singularity point within 60 ft. Creatures within 30 ft must save or take 2d10 force and be pulled in. Maintain concentration up to 1 minute.
